title: CTOV - Etched Compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and Etched mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Etched. You will find bard houses in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for Forge. 

**Etch mod**

Etch mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/etched)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
